import React from "react"; import { STATUS_THEME } from "./statusConfig"; import StatusBadge from "./StatusBadge"; function PredictView({ form, loading, error, result, submittedData, onChange, onSubmit, onReset, }) { const theme = result ? (STATUS_THEME[result.predicted_status] || STATUS_THEME.SAFE) : null; return (

Input

{error}
}

No prediction yet

Enter distance and relative velocity to generate a vehicle safety result.

)} {loading && (
)} {result && theme && (

{result.message}
)} {submittedData && (
Last Input
Distance: {submittedData.distance} m
Relative Velocity: {submittedData.relative_velocity} m/s
)}
); } export default PredictView;
